title: list_data_files
description: List files under a path inside /app/data, optionally filtered by glob. Also accepts a single file path to test existence.

pattern.description: Glob filter such as '*.pdf' or 'report.csv'. Optional.

result.description: Directory: newline-separated absolute paths or '[EMPTY] ...'. Existing file: '[EXISTS] <path>'. Missing: '[NOT FOUND] <path>'. Outside /app/data: '[ERROR] ...'.
